title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
